title: Yara's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Yara discovers colorful foods at snack time, from red apples to purple grapes. Each page introduces a new color and food with gentle sounds and repetitive patterns that help babies learn colors while enjoying familiar snacking moments.

pages.text: Yara loves snack time! Munch, munch, munch.

illustration.description: Baby Yara with warm brown skin and dark curly hair sits in a cream-colored high chair, clapping her chubby hands with joy. She wears a soft yellow bib with tiny rainbow dots. The kitchen background shows warm wooden cabinets and a sunny window. Her expression is pure delight with bright, wide eyes and an open-mouthed smile.
illustration.alt: Happy baby Yara in high chair ready for snack time

illustration.description: Yara holds a bright red apple slice in her tiny fingers, bringing it toward her mouth. The red apple contrasts beautifully against the soft cream background. Her caregiver's gentle brown hands are visible offering more apple slices from a pale wooden bowl. Yara's eyes are focused on the apple with concentration and excitement.
illustration.alt: Yara eating a red apple slice

illustration.description: Yara grasps an orange carrot stick, her face showing curiosity as she examines the bright orange color. Small orange crumbs dot her yellow bib. The background features soft peachy tones that complement the orange theme. Her caregiver, a person with medium brown skin and natural hair, smiles encouragingly in the background.
illustration.alt: Yara exploring an orange carrot stick

illustration.description: Yara squeezes a soft yellow banana piece, creating a delighted mess on her hands and bib. Her expression shows pure joy at the squishy texture. Golden yellow tones dominate the illustration with warm lighting from the kitchen window. Banana pieces are scattered on her high chair tray in an endearing, realistic baby mess.

Yara carefully picks up bright green peas one by one with her developing pincer grasp. Her concentration is evident as she focuses on the small round peas. The soft green background creates a calming atmosphere. A few peas have rolled onto the floor, showing the realistic challenge of baby self-feeding.
illustration.alt: Yara picking up green peas with careful concentration

illustration.description: Yara's fingers are stained purple-blue from plump blueberries. She holds one blueberry up to examine it, her eyes wide with wonder at the deep blue color. The background features soft lavender and blue tones. Her caregiver gently wipes her face with a soft cloth, both sharing a tender moment of care.
illustration.alt: Yara examining blueberries with purple-stained fingers

illustration.description: Yara gently squeezes a halved purple grape, fascinated by how it feels. Rich purple and lavender tones fill the scene. Her expression shows wonder and discovery as grape juice creates purple streaks on her bib. The lighting is warm and cozy, creating an intimate snack-time atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Yara squishing purple grapes with fascination

illustration.description: Yara sits contentedly surrounded by colorful food remnants on her tray - red apple pieces, orange carrots, yellow banana, green peas, blue berries, and purple grapes create a beautiful rainbow array. Her face shows satisfaction and happiness, with food-stained cheeks and a big smile. Her caregiver's loving hands reach in to clean up, showing the caring end to snack time.
illustration.alt: Happy Yara surrounded by rainbow of colorful snack foods

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Yara's apple?
questions.explanation: Yara eats a red apple that goes crunch, crunch!

questions.question: What sound do the peas make?
questions.explanation: The green peas make a pop, pop, pop sound!

questions.question: What does Yara love?
questions.explanation: Yara loves snack time and all her colorful foods!

pages.text: Yara loves ___ time! Munch, munch, munch.
